name: Refrigerated Warehousing and Storage
rationale: Best incumbent vulnerability in set (7.0 — no storage incumbent, only diesel/tariff/none) + solid ODI (6.05) + good job coverage (7.5). 24/7 refrigeration is structurally excellent peak-shaving target. Held back by C&I education gap (5 mitigable, 3 medium inc. CAPEX education).
